description: A university rocketry team is upscaling a proven low-power model rocket design by a factor of 2.0 to serve as their Level 1 High Power Rocketry (HPR) certification vehicle. Upscale the 'A simple model rocket' design by a factor of exactly 2.0 and manually correct the resulting motor mount to a standard 38mm inner diameter. Run a flight simulation using a 38mm H-class or I-class motor to verify stability and performance. Save the modified rocket design to ~/Documents/rockets/upscaled_2x.ork. Write an upscale report to ~/Documents/exports/upscale_report.txt documenting the original and new overall lengths, the original and new body tube diameters, the specific correction made to the motor mount to achieve 38mm, and the chosen motor's simulated apogee altitude.
